departments.name: Cardiology
departments.shortDescription: Specialized care for heart and cardiovascular diseases.
departments.description: Our Cardiology Department provides comprehensive diagnosis, treatment, and preventive care for heart and blood vessel diseases using modern technology and experienced cardiologists.

departments.name: Neurology
departments.shortDescription: Expert diagnosis and treatment for brain and nervous system disorders.
departments.description: The Neurology Department specializes in diagnosing and treating disorders of the brain, spinal cord, and nervous system with advanced medical care.

departments.name: Pediatrics
departments.shortDescription: Complete healthcare services for infants, children, and adolescents.
departments.description: Our Pediatrics Department provides compassionate healthcare for newborns, infants, children, and teenagers, ensuring healthy growth and development.

departments.name: Orthopedics
departments.shortDescription: Advanced treatment for bones, joints, muscles, and spine.
departments.description: The Orthopedics Department offers diagnosis, treatment, rehabilitation, and surgical care for bone, joint, muscle, and spine conditions.

features.title: Expert Specialists
features.description: Our doctors are highly trained specialists with decades of combined experience in their fields.

features.title: 24/7 Availability
features.description: Round-the-clock emergency care and consultations. We are always here when you need us most.

features.title: Safe & Hygienic
features.description: All departments maintain the highest standards of cleanliness and infection control protocols.

features.title: Patient-First Approach
features.description: Every decision we make puts patient comfort, dignity, and wellbeing at the center.

testimonials.name: Rahima Begum
testimonials.text: The cardiology team was exceptional. From the moment I arrived, I felt cared for and in safe hands. The doctors explained everything clearly and the treatment was top-notch.

testimonials.name: Karim Uddin
testimonials.text: I had a knee issue for years. The orthopedics department gave me a thorough diagnosis and the treatment worked beautifully. I'm now walking without pain. Thank you!

testimonials.name: Nasrin Akter
testimonials.text: My child was treated in the Pediatrics department. The doctors were so kind and gentle with her. The whole experience was stress-free and professional. Highly recommended!
